title: Thinking in Bets
author: Annie Duke
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two playing cards: the left shows 60% (a partial deck), the right shows 40% (the rest of the pie). One is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- Card 1 (LEFT, ash, 60% bet) -->
    <g transform="translate(-300 0)">
      <rect x="-150" y="-220" width="300" height="440" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <!-- A pie chart inside: 60% ash filled, 40% open -->
      <g transform="translate(0 0)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <!-- 60% wedge: from 0deg to 216deg -->
        <path d="M 0 0 L 100 0 A 100 100 0 1 1 -30.9 95.1 Z" fill="#cccccc" opacity="0.3" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      </g>
      <text x="0" y="160" font-size="48" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="-0.04em">60%</text>
      <text x="0" y="200" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">YOUR BET</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Card 2 (RIGHT, RED, 40% bet) -->
    <g transform="translate(300 0)">
      <rect x="-150" y="-220" width="300" height="440" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <!-- A pie chart inside: 40% red wedge -->
      <g transform="translate(0 0)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1"/>
        <!-- 40% wedge: from 0 to 144deg -->
        <path d="M 0 0 L 100 0 A 100 100 0 0 1 -80.9 58.8 Z" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.3" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
      </g>
      <text x="0" y="160" font-size="48" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-0.04em">40%</text>
      <text x="0" y="200" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.18em">HIDDEN</text>
    </g>
    <!-- A whisper label between the two cards -->
    <text x="0" y="-260" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">EXPECTED VALUE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two playing cards: left card is ash 60% (your bet, what you know); right card is RED 40% (the hidden part of the probability). Together they make 100%. 220px whisper title at the top — the cards ARE the cover.
